form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[业务组织] visitId[维护访问] requestId[维护请求] equipmentId[设备] businessDate[消耗日期] warehouseId[领料仓库] =========>amount[金额信息]====== totalAmount[金额合计] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] =========>posting[过账信息]====== posted[已过账] postedAt[过账时间] postedBy[过账人] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== code[单号] orgId[业务组织] visitId[维护访问] requestId[维护请求] equipmentId[设备] businessDate[消耗日期] warehouseId[领料仓库] =========>amount[金额信息]====== totalAmount[金额合计] =========>status[状态信息]====== docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] approvedBy[审核人] approvedAt[审核时间] =========>posting[过账信息]====== posted[已过账] postedAt[过账时间] postedBy[过账人] ========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注](2) createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: code[单号] docStatus[单据状态] approveStatus[审核状态] equipmentId[设备] businessDate[消耗日期]
